1	package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;
2	
3	import com.google.ortools.sat.Constraint;
4	import com.google.ortools.sat.ConstraintProto;
5	import com.google.ortools.sat.Literal;
6	
7	import lombok.Data;
8	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
9	
10	/**
11	 * 带松弛变量的约束包装类
12	 * 用于支持约束冲突调试功能
13	 *
14	 * @since 2025-01-27
15	 */
16	@Slf4j
17	@Data
18	public class AlgCPConstraint {
19	    /**
20	     * 原始CP-SAT约束对象
21	     */
22	    private Constraint cpConstraint;
23	
24	    /**
25	     * 松弛变量，用于约束冲突调试
26	     *
27	     * <p>
28	     * 当松弛变量为false时，约束将被"放松"（不强制执行），
29	     * 从而帮助识别导致无解的约束组合。这是约束冲突调试的核心机制。
30	     * </p>
31	     */
32	    private Literal relaxationVar;
33	
34	    /**
35	     * 松弛变量名称，用于调试和日志记录
36	     *
37	     * <p>
38	     * 松弛变量名称通常包含约束的标识信息，便于在冲突分析时
39	     * 快速定位问题约束。例如："relax_constraint_rule_001"。
40	     * </p>
41	     */
42	    private String relaxationVarName = "";
43	
44	    /**
45	     * 约束名称，如：addGreaterOrEqual
46	     */
47	    private String name = "";
48	
49	    /**
50	     * 左表达式的str
51	     */
52	    private String left = "";
53	
54	    /**
55	     * 操作符
56	     */
57	    private String operator = "";
58	
59	    /**
60	     * 右表达式的str
61	     */
62	    private String right = "";
63	
64	    /**
65	     * 条件信息
66	     */
67	    private String ifMemo = "";
68	
69	    /**
70	     * 左表达式名称
71	     */
72	    private String leftName = "";
73	
74	    /**
75	     * 右表达式名称
76	     */
77	    private String rightName = "";
78	
79	    public AlgCPConstraint(Constraint cpConstraint, Literal relaxationVar, String relaxationVarName) {
80	        this.cpConstraint = cpConstraint;
81	        this.relaxationVar = relaxationVar;
82	        this.relaxationVarName = relaxationVarName;
83	
84	        if (relaxationVar != null && cpConstraint != null) {
85	            cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not());
86	        }
87	        log.info("Constraint created: {} with relaxation: {}", name, relaxationVarName);
88	    }
89	
90	    /**
91	     * 设置约束执行条件
92	     *
93	     * @param condition 执行条件
94	     */
95	    public void onlyEnforceIf(Literal condition) {
96	        cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(condition);
97	        ifMemo += " if " + toNameString(condition);
98	        log.info("relax:{} -----AlgCPConstraint:onlyEnforceIf", relaxationVarName);
99	    }
100	
101	    /**
102	     * 不支持的方法 - 抛出异常
103	     * 
104	     * @param builder 构建器
105	     */
106	    public AlgCPConstraint(ConstraintProto.Builder builder) {
107	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support ConstraintProto.Builder constructor");
108	    }
109	
110	    /**
111	     * 不支持的方法 - 抛出异常
112	     * 
113	     * @param lits 字面量数组
114	     */
115	    public void onlyEnforceIf(Literal[] lits) {
116	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support onlyEnforceIf with Literal array");
117	    }
118	
119	    /**
120	     * 获取约束索引
121	     * 
122	     * @return 约束索引
123	     */
124	    public int getIndex() {
125	        return cpConstraint.getIndex();
126	    }
127	
128	    /**
129	     * 不支持的方法 - 抛出异常
130	     *
131	     * @return 构建器
132	     */
133	    public ConstraintProto.Builder getBuilder() {
134	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support getBuilder method");
135	    }
136	
137	    /**
138	     * 将文字转换为名称字符串
139	     *
140	     * @param lit 文字对象
141	     * @return 名称字符串
142	     */
143	    public static String toNameString(Literal lit) {
144	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar) {
145	            return ((com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar) lit).getName();
146	        }
147	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar) {
148	            return ((com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar) lit).getName();
149	        }
150	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.NotBoolVar) {
151	            String str = lit.toString();
152	            // str = not(sd1.S(0..1)) --> extract "sd1.S"
153	            // Parse the string: "not(varName(range))" -> "varName"
154	            if (str.startsWith("not(") && str.endsWith(")")) {
155	                String inner = str.substring(4, str.length() - 1); // Remove "not(" and ")"
156	                int parenIndex = inner.indexOf('(');
157	                if (parenIndex > 0) {
158	                    return "!" + inner.substring(0, parenIndex); // Extract variable name before "("
159	                }
160	            }
161	        }
162	        // Handle other unsupported Literal types
163	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException(
164	                "Unsupported Literal type: " + lit.getClass().getSimpleName()
165	                        + ". Only BoolVar, IntVar, and NotBoolVar are supported. Literal: " + lit);
166	    }
167	
168	    /**
169	     * 返回约束的字符串表示
170	     *
171	     * @return 格式化的约束字符串
172	     */
173	    @Override
174	    public String toString() {
175	        StringBuffer sb = new StringBuffer();
176	        sb.append(left).append(" ").append(operator).append(" ").append(right).append(ifMemo).append(" (").append(name)
177	                .append(")");
178	        if (!leftName.isEmpty()) {
179	            sb.append(" L:").append(leftName);
180	        }
181	        if (!rightName.isEmpty()) {
182	            sb.append(" R:").append(rightName);
183	        }
184	        return sb.toString();
185	    }
186	}

121	    public AlgCPModel() {
122	        this(new CpModel());
123	    }

125	    /**
126	     * 构造函数，使用指定的CpModel实例
127	     *
128	     * @param cpModel 要封装的CpModel实例
129	     */
130	    public AlgCPModel(final CpModel cpModel) {
131	        this.cpModel = cpModel;
132	        this.variables = new HashMap<>();
133	        this.variableLogs = new ArrayList<>();
134	        this.constraints = new ArrayList<>();

137	    /**
138	     * 添加规则分隔符
139	     * 
140	     * @param ruleCode 规则代码
141	     */
142	    public void addRuleSeperator(String ruleCode) {
143	        AlgCPConstraint constraint = new AlgCPConstraint(null, null, "");
144	        constraint.setName("-".repeat(5) + ruleCode + "-".repeat(5));
145	        constraints.add(constraint);
146	    }
147	
148	    private void setCurrentRelaxVarName(String ruleCode, int weight) {
149	        if (!isAttachRelax) {
150	            log.info("relax:{} relax is not attached,setCurrentRelaxVarName", ruleCode);
151	            return;
152	        }
153	        log.info("relax:{} relax is attached,setCurrentRelaxVarName", ruleCode);
154	        this.currentRelaxVarName = "relax_" + ruleCode;
155	        this.currentRelaxVar = newBoolVar(this.currentRelaxVarName);
156	
157	        int tempWeight = weight;
158	        if (confictedRelaxVarMap.containsKey(this.currentRelaxVarName)) {
159	            tempWeight = tempWeight + RelaxVar.WEIGHT_ADDER;
160	        }
161	
162	        RelaxVar relaxVar = new RelaxVar(this.currentRelaxVarName, ruleCode, this.currentRelaxVar, tempWeight);
163	        if (relaxationVarMap.containsKey(this.currentRelaxVarName)) {
164	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Relaxation variable already exists: " + ruleCode);
165	        }
166	        relaxationVarMap.put(this.currentRelaxVarName, relaxVar);
167	    }
168

171	     * 
172	     * @param ruleCode 规则代码
173	     */
174	    public void setRelax4SysRule(String ruleCode) {
175	        setCurrentRelaxVarName(ruleCode, RelaxVar.WEIGHT_SMALL);
176	    }

182	     */
183	    public void setRelax4CustomRule(String ruleCode) {
184	        setCurrentRelaxVarName(ruleCode, RelaxVar.WEIGHT_MEDIUM);
185	    }

226	    /**
227	     * 附加松弛变量到约束
228	     *
229	     * @param ct      约束
230	     * @param funName 函数名称
231	     * @return 带松弛变量的约束包装
232	     */
233	    private AlgCPConstraint attachRelax(Constraint ct, String funName) {
234	        log.info("relax:{} -----{}", currentRelaxVarName, funName);
235	        AlgCPConstraint constraint = new AlgCPConstraint(ct, this.currentRelaxVar, this.currentRelaxVarName);
236	        constraint.setName(funName);
237	        // 注意：约束添加到列表的操作现在在 createAndTrackConstraint 方法中进行
238	        return constraint;
239	    }

241	    /**
242	     * 创建整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVar方法
243	     *
244	     * @param left  变量的最小值
245	     * @param right 变量的最大值
246	     * @param name  变量名称
247	     * @return 创建的整数变量
248	     */
249	    public IntVar newIntVar(final long left, final long right, final String name) {
250	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVar(left, right, name);
251	        registerVariables(tv, name);
252	        trackVariable(tv, left, right, name);
253	        log.info("Variable created: {} in [{}, {}]", name, left, right);
254	        return tv;
255	    }
256	
257	    /**
258	     * 从单个值创建整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVarFromDomain方法
259	     *
260	     * @param value 变量的固定值
261	     * @param name  变量名称
262	     * @return 创建的整数变量
263	     */
264	    public IntVar newIntVarFromDomain(final long value, final String name) {
265	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVarFromDomain(Domain.fromValues(new long[] { value }), name);
266	        registerVariables(tv, name);
267	        trackVariable(tv, value, value, name);
268	        log.info("Variable created: {} = {}", name, value);
269	        return tv;
270	    }
271	
272	    /**
273	     * 从多个值创建整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVarFromDomain方法
274	     *
275	     * @param values 变量的可能值数组
276	     * @param name   变量名称
277	     * @return 创建的整数变量
278	     */
279	    public IntVar newIntVarFromDomain(final long[] values, final String name) {
280	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVarFromDomain(Domain.fromValues(values), name);
281	        registerVariables(tv, name);
282	        trackVariable(tv, values[0], values[values.length - 1], name);
283	        log.info("Variable created: {} in domain {}", name, java.util.Arrays.toString(values));
284	        return tv;
285	    }

287	    /**
288	     * 从区间创建整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVarFromDomain方法
289	     *
290	     * @param intervals 变量的区间范围数组
291	     * @param name      变量名称
292	     * @return 创建的整数变量
293	     */
294	    public IntVar newIntVarFromDomain(final long[][] intervals, final String name) {
295	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVarFromDomain(Domain.fromIntervals(intervals), name);
296	        registerVariables(tv, name);
297	        trackVariable(tv, intervals[0][0], intervals[intervals.length - 1][1], name);
298	        log.info("Variable created: {} in intervals {}", name, java.util.Arrays.deepToString(intervals));
299	        return tv;
300	    }

302	    /**
303	     * 创建具有完整域的整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVarFromDomain方法
304	     *
305	     * @param name 变量名称
306	     * @return 创建的整数变量
307	     */
308	    public IntVar newIntVarFromDomain(final String name) {
309	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVarFromDomain(Domain.fromValues(new long[] { Long.MIN_VALUE, Long.MAX_VALUE }),
310	                name);
311	        registerVariables(tv, name);
312	        trackVariable(tv, Long.MIN_VALUE, Long.MAX_VALUE, name);
313	        log.info("Variable created: {} in full domain", name);
314	        return tv;

317	    /**
318	     * 创建布尔变量，封装CpModel的newBoolVar方法
319	     *
320	     * @param name 变量名称

322	     */
323	    public BoolVar newBoolVar(final String name) {
324	        BoolVar tv = this.cpModel.newBoolVar(name);
325	        registerVariablesBool(tv, name);
326	        trackVariable(tv, 0, 1, name);
327	        log.info("BoolVar created: {} in {0, 1}", name);

331	    /**
332	     * 注册其他变量
333	     * 
334	     * @param tv   变量对象
335	     * @param name 变量名称
336	     */
337	    private void registerVariables(final IntVar tv, final String name) {
338	        // 判断是否已经存在，如果已经存在，则抛异常
339	        if (otherVarMap.containsKey(name)) {
340	            log.error("Variable already exists: {}", name);
341	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Variable already exists: " + name);
342	        }
343	
344	        // name不是以ParaVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX 且
345	        // PartVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX开头，则添加到otherVarMap
346	        if (!name.startsWith(ParaVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX) && !name.startsWith(PartVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX)) {
347	            OtherVar otherVar = new OtherVar();
348	            otherVar.setCode(name);
349	            otherVar.setVar(tv);
350	            otherVar.setShortCode("o" + (++otherVarIndex));
351	            otherVarMap.put(name, otherVar);
352	        }
353	    }
354	
355	    /**
356	     * 注册其他变量 - BoolVar版本
357	     *
358	     * @param tv   变量对象
359	     * @param name 变量名称
360	     */
361	    private void registerVariablesBool(final BoolVar tv, final String name) {
362	        registerVariables(tv, name);
363	    }

365	    /**
366	     * 跟踪变量创建信息
367	     *
368	     * @param var  变量对象
369	     * @param lb   下界
370	     * @param ub   上界
371	     * @param name 变量名称
372	     */
373	    private void trackVariable(IntVar var, long lb, long ub, String name) {
374	        variables.put(name, var);
375	        variableLogs.add(String.format("%s in [%d, %d]", name, lb, ub));
376	    }

378	    /**
379	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（LinearArgument约束）
380	     *
381	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
382	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
383	     * @param rightValue     右侧值
384	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
385	     * @param operator       操作符
386	     * @return 包装的约束对象
387	     */
388	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, LinearArgument leftExpr, long rightValue,
389	            String constraintName, String operator) {
390	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
391	        algCt.setLeft(toNameString(leftExpr));
392	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
393	        algCt.setRight(String.valueOf(rightValue));
394	        constraints.add(algCt);
395	        return algCt;
396	    }
397	
398	    /**
399	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（AlgCPLinearExpr约束）
400	     *
401	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
402	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
403	     * @param rightValue     右侧值
404	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
405	     * @param operator       操作符
406	     * @return 包装的约束对象
407	     */
408	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, AlgCPLinearExpr leftExpr, long rightValue,
409	            String constraintName, String operator) {
410	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
411	        algCt.setLeft(leftExpr.toString());
412	        algCt.setLeftName(leftExpr.getName());
413	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
414	        algCt.setRight(String.valueOf(rightValue));
415	        constraints.add(algCt);
416	        return algCt;
417	    }

442	     *

450	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, LinearArgument leftExpr,
451	            AlgCPLinearExpr rightExpr,

472	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, AlgCPLinearExpr leftExpr,
473	            LinearArgument rightExpr,

497	    /**
498	     * 将LinearArgument转换为名称字符串
499	     *
500	     * @param expr LinearArgument表达式
501	     * @return 名称字符串
502	     */
503	    public static String toNameString(LinearArgument expr) {
504	        if (expr instanceof IntVar) {
505	            return ((IntVar) expr).getName();
506	        } else if (expr instanceof BoolVar) {
507	            return ((BoolVar) expr).getName();
508	        } else {
509	            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported linear argument type: " + expr.getClass().getName());
510	        }
511	    }

648	    /**
649	     * 添加蕴含约束，a蕴含b
650	     *
651	     * @param a 前提字面量
652	     * @param b 结论字面量
653	     * @return 添加的约束

1075	    private AlgCPConstraint addVirutalAlgCPConstraint(String name, AlgCPLinearExpr expr) {
1076	        AlgCPConstraint ct = new AlgCPConstraint(null, this.currentRelaxVar, this.currentRelaxVarName);
1077	        ct.setName(name);
1078	        ct.setLeft(expr.toString());
1079	        ct.setLeftName(expr.getName());
1080	        this.objectExpr = expr;
1081	        constraints.add(ct);
1082	        return ct;
1083	    }

1159	        log.info("-".repeat(80));

1175	    public void printRunValue(CpSolver cpSolver, CpSolverStatus status) {
1176	        log.info("\nCpSolverStatus:{} ", status);
1177	        if (status == CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE) {
1178	            return;
1179	        }
1180	        log.info("\nVARIABLE VALUES ({}):", variables.size());
1181	        log.info("-".repeat(80));
1182	        for (IntVar var : variables.values()) {
1183	            long value = cpSolver.value(var);
1184	            log.info(String.format("  %-20s = %d", var.getName(), value));
1185	        }
1186	        if (status == CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL || status == CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE) {
1187	            log.info("\nObject Value ={}", cpSolver.objectiveValue());
1188	        } else {
1189	            log.info("\nObject Value ={}", "not");
1190	        }
1191	
1192	        log.info("-".repeat(80));
1193	    }
1194	}

49	/**
50	 * 模块约束执行器实现类
51	 * 实现ModuleConstraintExecutor接口，提供约束求解的核心功能
52	 * 
53	 * @since 2025-09-22

55	@Slf4j
56	public class ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl implements ModuleConstraintExecutor {
57	
58	    private final Map<Long, Module> moduleMap = new HashMap<>();
59	
60	    private final Map<Long, ModuleAlgClassLoader> moduleAlgClassLoaderMap = new HashMap<>();
61	
62	    private final List<ExtensibleProcess> extensibleProcesses = new CopyOnWriteArrayList<>();

64	    private ConstraintConfig config;
65	
66	    @Override
67	    public Result<Void> init(final ConstraintConfig config) {
68	        this.config = config;
69	        log.info("Module constraint executor initialized");
70	        return Result.success(null);
71	    }
72	
73	    @Override
74	    public final Result<Void> fini() {
75	        // 销毁所有扩展处理器
76	        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
77	            process.destroy();
78	        }
79	        extensibleProcesses.clear();
80	        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.clear();
81	        moduleMap.clear();
82	        log.info("Module constraint executor finalized");
83	        return Result.success(null);
84	    }

86	    @Override
87	    public final Result<Void> addModule(Long rootModuleId, Module... modules) {
88	        if (modules == null) {
89	            return Result.failed("modules is null");
90	        }
91	        for (Module m : modules) {
92	            if (m == null) {
93	                continue;
94	            }
95	            moduleMap.put(m.getId(), m);
96	            m.init();
97	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = ModuleAlgClassLoader.newInstance(config, m.getAlg());
98	            loader.init();
99	            moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.put(m.getId(), loader);
100	        }
101	        log.info("Added modules: {}", modules.length);
102	        return Result.success(null);
103	    }
104	
105	    @Override
106	    public Result<Void> removeModule(Long moduleId) {
107	        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.remove(moduleId);
108	        moduleMap.remove(moduleId);
109	        log.info("Removed module: {}", moduleId);
110	        return Result.success(null);
111	    }

113	    @Override
114	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
115	        return processProduct(module, partCategoryReq);
116	    }
117	
118	    private Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizePartConstraint(List<PartConstraintReq> orgReqs,
119	            IModule module) {
120	        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizedReqs = new HashMap<>();
121	        if (orgReqs == null) {
122	            return normalizedReqs;
123	        }
124	        for (PartConstraintReq orgReq : orgReqs) {
125	            List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode());
126	            if (reqs == null) {
127	                reqs = new ArrayList<>();
128	                normalizedReqs.put(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode(), reqs);
129	            }
130	            normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode()).add(orgReq);
131	        }
132	
133	        // 标准化， 1、每个rootCategory只有1个， 2、属于同一个rootCategory的PartConstraintReq，合并在一起
134	        // 3、原始需求中针对子的要转换为rootCategory
135	        return normalizedReqs;
136	    }
137	
138	    /**
139	     * 处理部件分类约束
140	     *
141	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
142	     * @return 推理结果
143	     */
144	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> processProduct(Module startModule, InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
145	        try {
146	            ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
147	
148	            Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(
149	                    partCategoryReq.getPartConstraintReqs(), startModule);
150	            // 查找原始部件分类
151	            Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterResult = filterClone(startModule, partConstraintReqMap);
152	            moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.getSecond());
153	
154	            Module filterModule = filterResult.getFirst();
155	            log.info("Priority-orignal module: {}", ModuleUtils.toShortString(startModule));
156	            log.info("Priority-filter module: {}", ModuleUtils.toShortString(filterModule));
157	            SolverResult sr = null;
158	            // 检查是否有优先级规则，如果有则使用分级求解
159	            if (filterModule.hasAllPriorityRule()) {
160	                sr = solveWithPriorityConstraints(filterModule, moduleInput);
161	            } else {
162	                sr = solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(filterModule, moduleInput);
163	            }
164	            return Result.success(sr.getSolutions());
165	
166	        } catch (Exception e) {
167	            log.error("Failed to process Module constraint", e);
168	            return Result.failed("Failed to process Module constraint: " + e.getMessage());
169	        }
170	    }
171	
172	    public static Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterClone(Module startModule,
173	            Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap) {
174	        Module result = startModule.clone();
175	        List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs = new ArrayList<>();
176	        List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = null;
177	        PartCategory filterPartCategory = null;
178	        for (PartCategory partCategory : startModule.getPartCategorys()) {
179	            reqs = partConstraintReqMap.get(partCategory.getCode());
180	            if (reqs == null) {
181	                // 如果是穷举多实例的情况，默认是放进去的，TODO：是不是一个也没有的时候也补充一个
182	                if (partCategory.isEnumMutiInst()) {
183	                    continue;
184	                }
185	                result.addPart(partCategory); // 完全挪过来
186	            } else {
187	                if (reqs.size() == 1) {
188	                    PartConstraintReq req = reqs.get(0);
189	                    filterPartCategory = partCategory.filterClone(req);
190	                    String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
191	                            filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
192	                            req.getAttrWhereCondition());
193	                    log.info(msg);
194	                    if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
195	                        throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
196	                    }
197	                    // result.addPart(filterPartCategory);
198	                    result.addPartCategory(filterPartCategory);
199	                    PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl
200	                            .toPartCategoryInput(
201	                                    filterPartCategory, req);
202	                    partCategoryInput.setSumAttrParas(partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.Sum));
203	                    partCategoryInputs.add(partCategoryInput);
204	                } else {
205	                    Pair<List<Rule>, List<Rule>> rulePair = RuleUtils.splitRules(partCategory.getRules());
206	                    List<AttrPara> sumsumAttrParas = partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.SumSum);
207	                    List<AttrPara> sumAttrParas = partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.Sum);
208	
209	                    MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInstPartCategoryInput = new MultiInstPartCategoryInput();
210	                    int instId = ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID;
211	                    for (PartConstraintReq req : reqs) {
212	                        if (req.getAttrType() == AttrParaType.SumSum) { // 总总的要求
213	                            PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.setPartCategoryInputBase(multiInstPartCategoryInput,
214	                                    req);
215	                            continue;
216	                        }
217	                        filterPartCategory = partCategory.filterClone(req);
218	                        String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
219	                                filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
220	                                req.getAttrWhereCondition());
221	                        log.info(msg);
222	                        if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
223	                            throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
224	                        }
225	                        filterPartCategory.setRules(rulePair.getFirst());
226	                        PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl
227	                                .toPartCategoryInput(
228	                                        filterPartCategory, req);
229	                        partCategoryInput.setInstId(instId++);
230	                        partCategoryInput.setSumAttrParas(sumAttrParas);
231	                        multiInstPartCategoryInput.addPartCategoryInput(partCategoryInput);
232	                    }
233	                    multiInstPartCategoryInput.setAllInstRules(rulePair.getSecond());
234	                    multiInstPartCategoryInput.setSumSumAttrParas(sumsumAttrParas);
235	                    result.addPartCategory(partCategory); // 放的是全的
236	                    partCategoryInputs.add(multiInstPartCategoryInput);
237	                }
238	            }
239	        }
240	        return new Pair<>(result, partCategoryInputs);
241	    }
242	
243	    @Override
244	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParas(InferParasReq req) {
245	        if (req == null) {
246	            return Result.failed("req is null");
247	        }
248	        if (req.getPartConstraintReqs() == null || req.getPartConstraintReqs().isEmpty()) {
249	            return inferParasOld(req);
250	        }
251	        try {
252	            // 获取基础数据
253	            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
254	            module.init();
255	
256	            // 创建部件分类约束执行器
257	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = getModuleClassLoader(module.getId());
258	            if (loader == null) {
259	                log.error("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: {}", module.getId());
260	                return Result.failed("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: " + module.getId());
261	            }
262	            ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl baseExecutor = null;
263	            Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = null;
264	            InferPartCategoryReq cReq = toInferPartCategoryReq(req);
265	            if (!Strings.isNullOrEmpty(cReq.getPartCategoryCode())) {
266	                baseExecutor = new PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl();
267	            } else {
268	                baseExecutor = this;
269	            }
270	            baseExecutor.init(module, config, loader);
271	            result = baseExecutor.doProcess(cReq);
272	
273	            return result;
274	        } catch (AlgLoaderException | AlgExecutorException ex) {
275	            log.error("Failed to infer paras", ex);
276	            return Result.failed("exception: " + ex.getMessage());
277	        }
278	    }
279	
280	    private Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParasOld(InferParasReq req) {
281	        if (req == null) {
282	            return Result.failed("req is null");
283	        }
284	        try {
285	            // 获取基础数据
286	            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
287	            module.init();
288	
289	            // 获取模块算法类加载器并初始化执行器
290	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = getModuleClassLoader(module.getId());
291	            if (loader == null) {
292	                log.error("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: {}", module.getId());
293	                return Result.failed("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: " +
294	                        module.getId());
295	            }
296	            this.init(module, config, loader);
297	
298	            // 执行约束推理
299	            RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>());
300	            CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
301	            ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = result.getSolutionCallBack();
302	
303	            // 如果模型无效，调用ValidateCpModel获取详细错误信息
304	            if (status == CpSolverStatus.MODEL_INVALID) {
305	                // 重新获取模型进行验证
306	                ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>());
307	                AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();
308	                String validationError = model.getCpModel().validate();
309	                log.error("Model validation failed: {}", validationError);
310	                return Result.failed("Model validation failed: " + validationError);
311	            }
312	
313	            if (status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
314	                    && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE) {
315	                return Result.failed("solver status: " + status);
316	            }
317	            if (status == CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE && config.isDebugByRelaxVar()) {
318	                // 没有可行解，如果 debugByRelaxVar= true，则使用松弛变量检测冲突规则
319	                Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> rcResult = null;
320	                List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
321	
322	                // 第一次运行
323	                rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
324	                confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
325	
326	                // 第二次运行，使用第一次的冲突结果
327	                rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
328	                confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
329	
330	                Result<List<ModuleInst>> r = Result.noSolution(toConfictMessage(confictedRelaxs));
331	
332	                // 最后一次solution的解
333	                List<ModuleInst> solutions = rcResult.getSecond().getSolutionCallBack().getSolverResult()
334	                        .getSolutions();
335	                r.setData(solutions);
336	                return r;
337	            }
338	
339	            // 执行后处理
340	            List<ModuleInst> solutions = cb.getSolverResult().getSolutions();
341	            solutions = executePostProcess(module, solutions);
342	
343	            return Result.success(solutions);
344	        } catch (AlgLoaderException | AlgExecutorException ex) {
345	            log.error("Failed to infer paras", ex);
346	            return Result.failed("exception: " + ex.getMessage());
347	        }
348	    }
349	
350	    @Override
351	    public Result<Void> registerExtensible(ExtensibleProcess eProcess) {
352	        if (eProcess == null) {
353	            return Result.failed("ExtensibleProcess is null");
354	        }
355	        if (extensibleProcesses.contains(eProcess)) {
356	            log.warn("ExtensibleProcess already registered: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
357	            return Result.success(null);
358	        }
359	        Result<Void> initResult = eProcess.init();
360	        if (initResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS) {
361	            return Result.failed("Failed to initialize extensible process: " + initResult.getMessage());
362	        }
363	        extensibleProcesses.add(eProcess);
364	        // 按优先级排序
365	        extensibleProcesses.sort(Comparator.comparingInt(ExtensibleProcess::getPriority));
366	        log.info("Registered extensible process: {} with priority: {}",
367	                eProcess.getProcessName(), eProcess.getPriority());
368	        return Result.success(null);
369	    }
370	
371	    @Override
372	    public Result<Void> unregisterExtensible(ExtensibleProcess eProcess) {
373	        if (eProcess == null) {
374	            return Result.failed("ExtensibleProcess is null");
375	        }
376	        if (!extensibleProcesses.contains(eProcess)) {
377	            log.warn("ExtensibleProcess not registered: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
378	            return Result.success(null);
379	        }
380	        eProcess.destroy();
381	        extensibleProcesses.remove(eProcess);
382	        log.info("Unregistered extensible process: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
383	        return Result.success(null);
384	    }

386	    /**
387	     * 根据模块ID获取模块算法类加载器
388	     * 
389	     * @param moduleId 模块ID
390	     * @return 找到的ModuleAlgClassLoader对象，如果未找到则返回null
391	     */
392	    private ModuleAlgClassLoader getModuleClassLoader(Long moduleId) {
393	        return moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.get(moduleId);
394	    }
395	
396	    /**
397	     * 计算冲突规则
398	     *
399	     * @param result 运行推理参数响应
400	     * @return 冲突松弛变量列表
401	     */
402	    private List<RelaxVar> calcConfictRules(RunInferParasRsp result) {
403	        AlgCPModel relaxModel = result.getAlgCPModel();
404	        // 获取冲突规则信息
405	        List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
406	        Map<String, RelaxVar> relaxVarMap = relaxModel.getRelaxVarMap();
407	        for (Map.Entry<String, RelaxVar> entry : relaxVarMap.entrySet()) {
408	            RelaxVar relaxVar = entry.getValue();
409	            if (result.getSolver().booleanValue(relaxVar.getValue())) {
410	                confictedRelaxs.add(relaxVar);
411	            }
412	        }
413	        return confictedRelaxs;
414	    }
415	
416	    /**
417	     * 将冲突松弛变量列表转换为冲突消息字符串
418	     *
419	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
420	     * @return 冲突消息字符串
421	     */
422	    private String toConfictMessage(List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) {
423	        StringBuilder conflictMessage = new StringBuilder("conflict rules: ");
424	        for (RelaxVar confictedRelax : confictedRelaxs) {
425	            conflictMessage.append(confictedRelax.getRuleCode()).append(",");
426	        }
427	        return conflictMessage.toString();
428	    }
429	
430	    private Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> runCalcConfictRules(Module module,
431	            InferParasReq req,
432	            boolean isAttachRelax,
433	            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) throws AlgExecutorException {
434	
435	        RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
436	        CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
437	        if (isFailed(status)) {
438	            throw new AlgExecutorException("Solver failed with status: " + status);
439	        }
440	        List<RelaxVar> newConfictedRelaxs = calcConfictRules(result);
441	        return new Pair<>(newConfictedRelaxs, result);
442	
443	    }
444	
445	    /**
446	     * 检查求解器状态是否失败
447	     *
448	     * @param status 求解器状态
449	     * @return 是否失败
450	     */
451	    private boolean isFailed(CpSolverStatus status) {
452	        return status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL
453	                && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
454	                && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE;
455	    }
456	
457	    /**
458	     * 执行约束推理
459	     * 
460	     * @param module          模块对象
461	     * @param req             参数反推请求
462	     * @param isAttachRelax   是否附加松弛变量
463	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
464	     * @return 包含求解器状态和回调对象的RunInferParasRsp
465	     * @throws AlgLoaderException   当算法加载器未找到时抛出
466	     * @throws AlgExecutorException 当创建算法执行时抛出
467	     */
468	    private RunInferParasRsp runInferParas(Module module,
469	            InferParasReq req,
470	            boolean isAttachRelax,
471	            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
472	            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
473	        // 初始化约束模型
474	        ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
475	        AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();
476	
477	        if (config.isLogModelProto()) {
478	            // 将module的CpModelProto信息输出到文件config.logFilePath/module.proto.txt
479	            model.getCpModel().exportToFile(config.getLogFilePath() + File.separator + module.getCode() + ".proto.txt");
480	        }
481	        CpSolver solver = new CpSolver();
482	        solver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
483	        solver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1); // 单线程搜索，防止有重复解
484	        if (model.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
485	            solver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
486	            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies");
487	        }
488	        log.info("solver parameters:\n" + solver.getParameters().toString());
489	        // 可按需设置更多参数
490	        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, alg);
491	        CpSolverStatus status = solver.solve(model.getCpModel(), cb);
492	        log.info("solver  models:\n");
493	        model.printModelSummary();
494	        return new RunInferParasRsp(status, cb, alg.getModel(), solver);
495	    }
496	
497	    private ModuleAlgImpl initConstraintModel(Module module, InferParasReq req,
498	            boolean isAttachRelax, List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
499	            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
500	        // 创建约束算法实例
501	        ModuleAlgImpl alg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
502	        AlgCPModel model = new AlgCPModel();
503	        model.setIsAttachRelax(isAttachRelax);
504	        model.setConfictedRelaxVars(confictedRelaxs);
505	        // 根据loadType决定是否使用差量加载模型
506	        if (config.getLoadType() == ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_INCREMENTAL) {
507	            // 差量加载模型
508	            List<String> inputProgObjs = ReqUtils.buildInputProgObjs(req);
509	
510	            // 查询子图
511	            Pair<List<String>, List<RefProgObjSchema>> relativePair = module
512	                    .querySubGraph(inputProgObjs.toArray(new String[0]));
513	
514	            // 打印relativePair.first,relativePair.second, 本次推理涉及到exeRules和exeProgObjs
515	            log.info("Incremental loading - involved rules: {}", relativePair.getFirst());
516	            log.info("Incremental loading - involved progObjs: {}",
517	                    relativePair.getSecond().stream().map(RefProgObjSchema::getProgObjCode)
518	                            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toList()));
519	
520	            // 调用新的initModel方法,issue:差量后续实现
521	            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
522	        } else {
523	            // 全量加载模型
524	            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
525	        }
526	
527	        // // 根据请求初始化约束模型
528	        // initModelByReq(req, alg);
529	
530	        // 添加松弛目标函数, 方便调试
531	        alg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
532	        return alg;
533	    }
534	
535	    private ModuleInput toModuleInput(Module startModule, InferParasReq req) {
536	        ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
537	        moduleInput.setModuleId(startModule.getId());
538	        moduleInput.setModuleCode(startModule.getCode());
539	        moduleInput.setMainPartInst(req.getMainPartInst());
540	        moduleInput.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
541	        moduleInput.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
542	        // moduleInput.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
543	        moduleInput.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
544	        // moduleInput.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
545	        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(req.getPartConstraintReqs(),
546	                startModule);
547	        Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterResult = ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone(startModule,
548	                partConstraintReqMap);
549	        moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.getSecond());
550	        return moduleInput;
551	    }
552	
553	    /**
554	     * 将InferParasReq转换为InferPartCategoryReq
555	     * 
556	     * @param req 参数反推请求
557	     * @return 部件分类请求
558	     */
559	    private InferPartCategoryReq toInferPartCategoryReq(InferParasReq req) {
560	        InferPartCategoryReq cReq = new InferPartCategoryReq();
561	        cReq.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
562	        cReq.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
563	        cReq.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
564	        cReq.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
565	        cReq.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
566	        return cReq;
567	    }
568	
569	    /**
570	     * 根据模块ID或模块代码获取模块对象
571	     * 
572	     * @param moduleId   模块ID，可为null
573	     * @param moduleCode 模块代码，可为null
574	     * @return 找到的模块对象，如果未找到则返回null
575	     */
576	    private Module getModule(Long moduleId, String moduleCode) {
577	        if (moduleId != null) {
578	            return moduleMap.get(moduleId);
579	        }
580	        if (moduleCode != null) {
581	            for (Module m : moduleMap.values()) {
582	                if (moduleCode.equals(m.getCode())) {
583	                    return m;
584	                }
585	            }
586	        }
587	        log.error("Module not found: moduleId={}, moduleCode={}", moduleId, moduleCode);
588	        throw new AlgLoaderException(
589	                String.format("Module not found: moduleId=%s, moduleCode=%s", moduleId, moduleCode));
590	    }
591	
592	    /**
593	     * 执行后处理
594	     * 
595	     * @param module    模块
596	     * @param solutions 原始解决方案
597	     * @return 处理后的解决方案
598	     */
599	    private List<ModuleInst> executePostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
600	        List<ModuleInst> result = solutions;
601	
602	        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
603	            if (process instanceof InferParasPostProcess) {
604	                result = applyPostProcess(module, result, (InferParasPostProcess) process);
605	            }
606	        }
607	
608	        return result;
609	    }
610	
611	    /**
612	     * 应用单个后处理流程
613	     * 
614	     * @param module        模块
615	     * @param currentResult 当前结果
616	     * @param postProcess   后处理流程
617	     * @return 处理后的结果
618	     */
619	    private List<ModuleInst> applyPostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> currentResult,
620	            InferParasPostProcess postProcess) {
621	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> processResult = postProcess.postProcess(module, currentResult);
622	        if (processResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS || processResult.getData() == null) {
623	            log.warn("Post process failed: {}, message: {}",
624	                    postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName(), processResult.getMessage());
625	            return currentResult;
626	        }
627	        log.info("Applied post process: {} successfully", postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName());
628	        return processResult.getData();
629	    }
630	
631	    /**
632	     * 将ModuleInst对象转换为JSON字符串
633	     * 
634	     * @param inst ModuleInst实例
635	     * @return JSON字符串
636	     */
637	    public static String toJson(ModuleInst inst) {
638	        try {
639	            ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
640	            mapper.setPropertyNamingStrategy(PropertyNamingStrategies.SNAKE_CASE);
641	            return mapper.writeValueAsString(inst);
642	        } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
643	            return "{\"error\": \"Serialization failed: " + e.getMessage() + "\"}";
644	        }
645	    }
646	
647	}

26	/**
27	 * 模块基础约束执行器抽象类
28	 * 提供模块约束执行的公共功能
29	 *
30	 * @since 2025-01-XX
31	 */
32	@Slf4j
33	public abstract class ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl {
34	
35	    protected Module module;
36	
37	    protected ConstraintConfig config;

39	    protected ModuleAlgClassLoader moduleAlgClassLoader;

41	    public void init(Module module, ConstraintConfig config,
42	            ModuleAlgClassLoader moduleAlgClassLoader) {
43	        this.module = module;
44	        this.config = config;
45	        this.moduleAlgClassLoader = moduleAlgClassLoader;
46	    }
47	
48	    /**
49	     * 执行约束处理的主方法，由子类实现
50	     *
51	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
52	     * @return 处理结果
53	     */
54	    public abstract Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq);
55	
56	    /**
57	     * 求解约束模型并返回结果（无优先级约束）
58	     *
59	     * @param filteredModuleBase 过滤后的模块基础
60	     * @param partCategoryReq    部件分类请求
61	     * @return 求解结果
62	     */
63	    protected SolverResult solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
64	        log.info("no Priority-process starting........");
65	        return invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
66	    }
67	
68	    /**
69	     * 主求解方法-带优先级约束
70	     */
71	    protected SolverResult solveWithPriorityConstraints(
72	            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
73	        log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step1 max/min starting........");
74	        // 步骤1：对每个优先级规则优化求解最优解 minimize(objecFun)
75	        SolverResult result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
76	
77	        if (!result.hasSolution()) {
78	            result.setMessage("Cannot find solution in first step");
79	            return result;
80	        }
81	
82	        // 步骤2：在保持高优先级目标接近最优的前提下，寻找多个解，objecFun <=
83	        // ajustObjectValue(不断调整ajustObjectValue)
84	        final int maxExecTimes = 5; // 最大执行次数,
85	        final int availableSolutionNum = 5; // 可行解的格式
86	        final int minSolutionThreshold = 3; // 最少解数量阈值
87	        int execTimes = 0;
88	        double baseAdjustCoeff = 0.5; // 基础调整系数
89	        double objectValue = result.getObjectiveValue();
90	        boolean needIncreased = true; // 是否需要增加objectvalue
91	        int needIncreasedTimes = 0;
92	        do {
93	            execTimes++;
94	            SolverResult lastResult = result;
95	            // 根据上一次求解结果动态调整策略
96	            if (execTimes > 1) {
97	                if (lastResult.isHasSearchMax()) {
98	                    // objectValue设置太大，最优解都没有处理，系数需要往下调
99	                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 0.7; // 降低调整幅度
100	                    needIncreased = false;
101	                    needIncreasedTimes = 0;
102	                    log.info(
103	                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: objective value too high, reducing adjustment coefficient to {}",
104	                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
105	                } else if (lastResult.getSolutions().size() < minSolutionThreshold) {
106	                    // 解数量太少，objectValue设置太小，系数需要往上调
107	                    needIncreasedTimes++;
108	                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 3 * needIncreasedTimes;
109	                    needIncreased = true;
110	                    log.info(
111	                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: too few solutions found, increasing adjustment coefficient to {}",
112	                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
113	                } else {
114	                    log.info("xxxx");
115	                    break;
116	                }
117	            }
118	            // 根据上一次调整方向决定本次调整
119	            if (!needIncreased) {
120	                objectValue = getAdjustObjectValue(objectValue, -baseAdjustCoeff);
121	            } else {
122	                objectValue = getAdjustObjectValue(objectValue, baseAdjustCoeff);
123	            }
124	            log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: adjusting objective value to {}", execTimes,
125	                    objectValue);
126	            result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, objectValue);
127	
128	        } while (execTimes < maxExecTimes
129	                && result.getSolutions().size() <= availableSolutionNum);
130	        result.setIterationTimes(execTimes);
131	        return result;
132	    }
133	
134	    /**
135	     * 验证优先级总体值
136	     */
137	    protected Pair<Boolean, String> validPriorityOverallValue(double solverValue, List<ModuleInst> exprValueSolutions) {
138	        StringBuffer sb = new StringBuffer();
139	        boolean result = false;
140	
141	        if (exprValueSolutions == null || exprValueSolutions.isEmpty()) {
142	            sb.append("exprValueSolutions is empty");
143	            result = false;
144	        } else {
145	            double priorityOverallValue = exprValueSolutions.get(0).getPriorityOverallValue();
146	            if (Double.compare(priorityOverallValue, solverValue) != 0) {
147	                sb.append(String.format(
148	                        "Priority overall value mismatch: solverValue=%.2f, exprValueSolutions.get(0).getPriorityOverallValue()=%.2f",
149	                        solverValue, priorityOverallValue));
150	                result = false;
151	            } else {
152	                result = true;
153	            }
154	        }
155	
156	        return Pair.of(result, sb.toString());
157	    }
158	
159	    /**
160	     * 获取调整后的目标值
161	     */
162	    protected double getAdjustObjectValue(double objectValue, double adjustCoeff) {
163	        int cResult = Double.compare(objectValue, 0.0);
164	        if (cResult < 0) {
165	            if (adjustCoeff >= 0) {
166	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 - adjustCoeff);
167	            } else {
168	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 + Math.abs(adjustCoeff));
169	            }
170	        } else if (cResult == 0) {
171	            objectValue = adjustCoeff;
172	        } else {
173	            if (adjustCoeff >= 0) {
174	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 + adjustCoeff);
175	            } else {
176	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 - Math.abs(adjustCoeff));
177	            }
178	        }
179	        return objectValue;
180	    }
181	
182	    /**
183	     * 求解器调用入口
184	     */
185	    protected SolverResult invokerSolver(
186	            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput, Double adjustOptimalValue) {
187	        log.info("invokerSolver starting........");
188	
189	        // 步骤1：对每个优先级规则优化求解最优解
190	        ModuleAlgImpl optAlg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
191	        AlgCPModel optModel = new AlgCPModel();
192	        optModel.setIsAttachRelax(false);
193	        optModel.setConfictedRelaxVars(new ArrayList<>());
194	        optAlg.init(optModel, filteredModuleBase, moduleInput);
195	        // initModelByReq(moduleInput, optAlg);
196	        optAlg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
197	        boolean hasPriorityRule = optAlg.hasPriorityRule();
198	        if (hasPriorityRule) {
199	            PartAlgCPLinearExpr priorityMergedExpr = optAlg.queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr();
200	            if (adjustOptimalValue == null) {
201	                optModel.minimize(priorityMergedExpr);
202	            } else {
203	                optModel.addLessOrEqual(priorityMergedExpr, adjustOptimalValue.longValue());
204	            }
205	        }
206	
207	        // 求解最优解
208	        CpSolver optSolver = new CpSolver();
209	        optSolver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1);
210	        optSolver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(true);
211	        optSolver.getParameters().setMaxTimeInSeconds(10);
212	        if (optModel.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
213	            optSolver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
214	            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies in opt solver");
215	        }
216	        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack optCb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, optAlg);
217	        optCb.setMaxSolutionNum(config.getMaxSolutionNum());
218	        log.info("solver  models:\n");
219	        optModel.printModelSummary();
220	        CpSolverStatus optStatus = optSolver.solve(optModel.getCpModel(), optCb);
221	        SolverResult sr = optCb.getSolverResult();
222	        sr.setSolverStatus(optStatus.toString());
223	        if (optStatus == CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL || optStatus == CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE) {
224	            sr.setObjectiveValue(optSolver.objectiveValue());
225	            log.info("Optimal value for : {}", optSolver.objectiveValue());
226	        } else {
227	            log.error("Failed to solver, status : " + optStatus);
228	            return sr;
229	        }
230	        if (hasPriorityRule && (adjustOptimalValue == null)) {
231	            Pair<Boolean, String> validResult = validPriorityOverallValue(sr.getObjectiveValue(), sr.getSolutions());
232	            if (!validResult.getFirst()) {
233	                String msg = "Failed to valid expr&solver " + validResult.getSecond();
234	                log.error(msg);
235	            }
236	        }
237	        sortSolutionsByPriority(sr.getSolutions());
238	        log.info("solutions: \n {}",
239	                SolutionUtils.toSolutionString(sr.getSolutions()));
240	        return sr;
241	    }
242	
243	    /**
244	     * 根据优先级对解决方案进行排序
245	     */
246	    protected void sortSolutionsByPriority(List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
247	        solutions.sort((a, b) -> -Double.compare(b.getPriorityOverallValue(), a.getPriorityOverallValue()));
248	        for (int i = 0; i < solutions.size(); i++) {
249	            solutions.get(i).setPrioritySortNo(i + 1);
250	        }
251	    }

```text
1	# RFC: 找出冲突并求出一个可行解
2	
3	> 状态: Draft  
4	> 创建日期: 2026-04-30  
5	> 作者: Codex + 项目维护者  
6	> 相关文档: `doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`, `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`
7	
8	## 摘要
9	
10	本 RFC 提议完善 JMix Config Engine 的无解诊断能力: 当用户输入条件与业务规则共同导致模型无解时, 引擎应在启用 `debugByRelaxVar` 后自动使用松弛变量重建模型, 最小化被放松的约束, 找出导致无解的规则集合, 并返回一个在放松这些规则后可行的配置解。
11	
12	该能力的用户价值有两层:
13	
14	- 告诉用户哪些输入或规则组合造成了无解, 例如 `ruleA` 与 `ruleB` 冲突。
15	- 给出一个松弛后的可行解, 让用户知道如果暂时放宽这些约束, 当前配置可以怎样满足其余条件。
16	
17	现有代码已经包含松弛变量相关实现, 主要分布在 `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl`, `AlgCPModel`, `AlgCPConstraint`, `RelaxVar`, `ModuleBaseAlgImpl.addRelaxObjectFunction()` 中。但由于后续功能演进, 该链路需要基于当前代码重新调通, 并补充回归测试。
18	
19	## 动机
20	
21	产品配置场景中, 用户经常先给出一组输入条件, 再由求解器补全剩余配置。若所有硬约束共同导致无解, 只返回“无可行解”对用户帮助有限。用户更需要知道:
22	
23	- 哪些规则或输入条件导致无解。
24	- 是否存在一组“最小放松”的约束, 使模型重新变成可行。
25	- 放松后的可行解是什么, 以便业务界面给出解释或推荐调整方案。
26	
27	当前项目核心设计已经把“冲突诊断”作为核心能力之一, 设计流程为: 为规则附加松弛变量, 最小化违反规则, 识别冲突规则, 报告冲突。本 RFC 将这条设计落成明确的行为契约、实现边界和测试要求。
28	
29	## 术语
30	
31	| 术语 | 含义 |
32	| --- | --- |
33	| 原始模型 | 按用户输入和全部业务规则构建的 CP-SAT 模型 |
34	| 松弛模型 | 为可诊断约束附加松弛变量后的 CP-SAT 模型 |
35	| 松弛变量 | 布尔变量, 用于控制某条规则是否暂时放松 |
36	| 冲突规则 | 在最小松弛目标下取值为“被放松”的规则 |
37	| 松弛可行解 | 放松冲突规则后, 满足其余约束的一个可行配置 |
38	| 系统规则 | 引擎自动生成的约束, 如输入条件、默认可见性、部件数量关系 |
39	| 自定义规则 | 业务规则方法或规则 Schema 生成的约束 |
40	
41	## Guide-level 说明
42	
43	### 用户视角
44	
45	当 `ConstraintConfig.debugByRelaxVar=false` 时, 行为保持不变: 原始模型无解时返回无解或空解, 不额外诊断。
46	
47	当 `ConstraintConfig.debugByRelaxVar=true` 时:
48	
49	1. 引擎先运行原始模型。
50	2. 如果原始模型有可行解, 直接返回成功结果。
51	3. 如果原始模型被证明无解, 引擎进入冲突诊断流程。
52	4. 引擎构建松弛模型, 给可诊断规则附加松弛变量。
53	5. 引擎最小化被放松约束的总权重。
54	6. 引擎返回 `NO_SOLUTION`, message 中包含冲突规则列表, data 中包含松弛后的可行解。
55	
56	示例:
57	
58	```text
59	输入:
60	  x.qty + y.qty < 20
61	  x.qty - y.qty > 10
62	  y.qty > 45
63	
64	原始模型:
65	  无解
66	
67	返回:
68	  code = NO_SOLUTION
69	  message = "conflict rules: rule3"
70	  data = [松弛 rule3 后的一组可行解]
71	```
72	
73	### 结果语义
74	
75	`NO_SOLUTION + data 非空` 表示“严格满足所有约束无解, 但系统找到松弛后的可行解”。这与 `SUCCESS` 不同, 调用方不能把 data 视为完全合法配置, 只能作为诊断解释和推荐修改的依据。
76	
77	### 解释语义
78	
79	返回解释应至少包含:
80	
81	- 冲突规则 code 列表。
82	- 松弛后的可行解。
83	- 可选: 每条冲突规则的自然语言描述、权重、约束表达式摘要。
84	
85	第一阶段可以保持现有 `Result.message` 字符串形式; 后续可扩展为结构化诊断对象。
86	
87	## Reference-level 设计
88	
89	### 整体流程
90	
91	```text
92	inferParas(req)
93	  |
94	  |-- build original model
95	  |-- solve original model
96	  |
97	  |-- if FEASIBLE/OPTIMAL:
98	  |     return SUCCESS(solutions)
99	  |
100	  |-- if INFEASIBLE and debugByRelaxVar=false:
101	  |     return SUCCESS(empty) 或 NO_SOLUTION, 取决于现有兼容策略
102	  |
103	  |-- if INFEASIBLE and debugByRelaxVar=true:
104	        |
105	        |-- build relaxed model
106	        |-- attach relax variables to diagnosable constraints
107	        |-- minimize weighted relax variables
108	        |-- solve relaxed model
109	        |-- collect relax variables with value = true
110	        |-- return NO_SOLUTION(conflict message, relaxed feasible solution)
111	```
112	
113	### 松弛变量建模
114	
115	现有 `AlgCPConstraint` 中的关键语义为:
116	
117	```java
118	if (relaxationVar != null && cpConstraint != null) {
119	    cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not());
120	}
121	```
122	
123	因此约束含义为:
124	
125	- `relaxVar = false`: 约束生效。
126	- `relaxVar = true`: 约束被放松。
127	
128	目标函数由 `ModuleBaseAlgImpl.addRelaxObjectFunction()` 添加:
129	
130	```java
131	minimize(sum(relaxVar[i] * weight[i]))
132	```
133	
134	这会让求解器优先放松数量少、权重低的规则。当前权重建议:
135	
136	| 规则类型 | 权重 | 意图 |
137	| --- | --- | --- |
138	| 系统规则 | `WEIGHT_SMALL` | 输入/系统约束可作为诊断对象, 但需明确是否允许放松 |
139	| 自定义规则 | `WEIGHT_MEDIUM` | 默认业务规则权重 |
140	| 已识别冲突规则二次运行 | `+ WEIGHT_ADDER` | 鼓励二次运行找出更多候选冲突 |
141	
142	### 诊断范围
143	
144	本 RFC 建议第一阶段覆盖以下约束:
145	
146	- 通过 `executeRuleMethod()` 执行的自定义规则。
147	- `addPartEquality()` 与 `addParaEquality()` 生成的用户输入约束。
148	- `sumFunConstraint()` 生成的部件分类输入约束。
149	- 默认可见性约束, 前提是它已被统一打上系统规则标识。
150	
151	不在第一阶段覆盖:
152	
153	- 变量域本身, 如 `newIntVar(0, maxQty)` 的上下界。
154	- OR-Tools 内部推导约束。
155	- 未通过 `AlgCPModel` 包装层添加的原生 `CpModel` 约束。
156	
157	### 与现有架构的关系
158	
159	本功能沿用核心设计中的对称分层:
160	
161	| 层级 | 职责 |
162	| --- | --- |
163	| Executor | 判断原始求解结果, 触发松弛诊断, 组装返回结果 |
164	| Algorithm | 在规则执行前设置当前松弛变量, 在模型完成后添加松弛目标函数 |
165	| Model Wrapper | 对 OR-Tools 约束附加 `onlyEnforceIf(relaxVar.not())`, 记录规则与变量映射 |
166	| Result Model | 承载严格无解状态、冲突消息和松弛可行解 |
167	
168	### 返回模型
169	
170	第一阶段保持兼容:
171	
172	```java
173	Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = Result.noSolution(conflictMessage);
174	result.setData(relaxedSolutions);
175	```
176	
177	建议后续新增结构化返回对象:
178	
179	```java
180	public class ConflictDiagnosis {
181	    private List<ConflictRule> conflictRules;
182	    private List<ModuleInst> relaxedSolutions;
183	    private String explanation;
184	}
185	
186	public class ConflictRule {
187	    private String ruleCode;
188	    private String naturalCode;
189	    private int weight;
190	    private String source;
191	}
192	```
193	
194	结构化返回不应阻塞本 RFC 的第一阶段实现。
195	
196	### 需要调通的现有链路
197	
198	基于当前代码, 至少需要验证和修复以下路径:
199	
200	- `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.inferParasOld()` 在 `INFEASIBLE && debugByRelaxVar` 下能进入诊断流程。
201	- `runCalcConfictRules()` 返回的松弛模型状态必须是 `OPTIMAL` 或 `FEASIBLE`; 若仍为 `INFEASIBLE`, 说明有不可松弛硬约束或模型构建遗漏。
202	- `calcConfictRules()` 中 `solver.booleanValue(relaxVar.getValue())` 能正确识别被放松规则。
203	- `Result.noSolution(...).setData(solutions)` 的 data 能被测试框架和调用方读取。
204	- 带 `onlyEnforceIf()` 的条件约束在叠加松弛变量后语义正确。
205	- 新增的部件约束、优先级求解、决策策略、多实例分类不破坏诊断流程。
206	
207	## Drawbacks
208	
209	- 松弛变量会扩大模型规模, 诊断流程至少需要额外一次求解。
210	- “最小松弛”受权重影响, 结果不是唯一的逻辑最小冲突集。
211	- 如果某些约束未经过 `AlgCPModel` 包装, 它们不会被松弛, 可能导致诊断模型仍无解。
212	- `NO_SOLUTION` 携带 data 的语义容易被调用方误用, 需要文档和测试明确。
213	
214	## Alternatives
215	
216	### 使用 CP-SAT assumptions/unsat core
217	
218	OR-Tools CP-SAT 支持基于 assumptions 的 unsat core 思路, 可直接分析不可满足核心。但当前 Java 封装和业务规则映射已经围绕 `RelaxVar` 建模, 且需求同时要求“松弛后可行解”。因此第一阶段继续使用松弛变量更贴合现有实现。
219	
220	### 逐条禁用规则重试
221	
222	可以通过逐条移除规则来定位冲突, 实现简单但复杂度高, 且难以同时处理多规则组合冲突。该方案不建议作为主路径。
223	
224	### 只返回冲突规则, 不返回可行解
225	
226	这能降低实现复杂度, 但无法满足“松弛之后当前部分满足的解释如下”的原始需求。因此不可作为最终方案。

Here is the comprehensive report on the relax variable implementation.

---

## 1. RelaxVar class

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\RelaxVar.java`

**Lines:** 1-44

The class is a simple Lombok `@Data` POJO with four fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `name` | `String` | Relaxation variable name (e.g. `"relax_rule3"`) |
| `ruleCode` | `String` | The rule code this relax var is associated with |
| `value` | `BoolVar` | The OR-Tools boolean variable controlling relaxation |
| `weight` | `int` | Weight in the minimization objective |

Weight constants (lines 17-23):
- `WEIGHT_SMALL = 1` -- used for system-level constraints
- `WEIGHT_MEDIUM = 25` -- used for custom/business rules
- `WEIGHT_BIG = 1000` -- (defined but not used in current code)
- `WEIGHT_ADDER = 1000` -- added to existing weight for previously-identified conflict rules on second pass

---

## 2. ModuleBaseAlgImpl.addRelaxObjectFunction()

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\ModuleBaseAlgImpl.java`

**Lines:** 260-278

```java
public void addRelaxObjectFunction() {
    if (!model.isIsAttachRelax()) {
        return;
    }

    List<RelaxVar> relaxVars = new ArrayList<>(model.getRelaxVarMap().values());
    if (!relaxVars.isEmpty()) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr[] weightedTerms = new AlgCPLinearExpr[relaxVars.size()];
        for (int i = 0; i < relaxVars.size(); i++) {
            RelaxVar relaxVar = relaxVars.get(i);
            weightedTerms[i] = AlgCPLinearExpr.term(relaxVar.getValue(), relaxVar.getWeight());
        }
        AlgCPLinearExpr objectiveExpr = AlgCPLinearExpr.sum(weightedTerms);
        model.minimize(objectiveExpr);
        log.info("relax: -----relaxation objective function with {} relaxation variables", relaxVars.size());
    }
}
```

**What it does:** If `model.isAttachRelax` is false, it is a no-op (returns immediately). If true, it builds a weighted objective `minimize(sum(relaxVar.value * relaxVar.weight))` from all registered relax variables in the model's `relaxVarMap`. This drives the CP-SAT solver to find the minimal set of constraints to relax in order to achieve feasibility.

---

## 3. Where relax variables are created and attached to constraints

All relax creation flows through `AlgCPModel.setCurrentRelaxVarName()`.

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\AlgCPModel.java`

### 3a. setCurrentRelaxVarName() -- central creation point (lines 148-167)

```java
private void setCurrentRelaxVarName(String ruleCode, int weight) {
    if (!isAttachRelax) {
        return;
    }
    this.currentRelaxVarName = "relax_" + ruleCode;
    this.currentRelaxVar = newBoolVar(this.currentRelaxVarName);

    int tempWeight = weight;
    if (confictedRelaxVarMap.containsKey(this.currentRelaxVarName)) {
        tempWeight = tempWeight + RelaxVar.WEIGHT_ADDER;  // +1000 for previously-conflict rules
    }

    RelaxVar relaxVar = new RelaxVar(this.currentRelaxVarName, ruleCode, this.currentRelaxVar, tempWeight);
    if (relaxationVarMap.containsKey(this.currentRelaxVarName)) {
        throw new AlgLoaderException("Relaxation variable already exists: " + ruleCode);
    }
    relaxationVarMap.put(this.currentRelaxVarName, relaxVar);
}
```

This method:
1. Checks `isAttachRelax` -- if false, does nothing.
2. Creates a new `BoolVar` named `"relax_" + ruleCode`.
3. If this relax var name was in `confictedRelaxVarMap` (from a previous run), adds `WEIGHT_ADDER` (1000) to its weight to penalize re-relaxing already-identified conflict rules.
4. Creates and stores a `RelaxVar` in `relaxationVarMap`.

### 3b. Two entry points for setting current relax (lines 173-185)

```java
public void setRelax4SysRule(String ruleCode) {
    setCurrentRelaxVarName(ruleCode, RelaxVar.WEIGHT_SMALL);  // weight = 1
}

public void setRelax4CustomRule(String ruleCode) {
    setCurrentRelaxVarName(ruleCode, RelaxVar.WEIGHT_MEDIUM);  // weight = 25
}
```

### 3c. Callers that invoke setRelax4SysRule/CustomRule

**In `ModuleBaseAlgImpl`:**
- `setDefaultVisibilityConstraints()` (line 190) -- calls `this.model.setRelax4SysRule("hiddensrule")`
- `executeRuleMethod()` (line 301) -- calls `this.model.setRelax4CustomRule(rule.getCode())` before each rule method invocation
- `addPartEquality()` (line 979) -- calls `this.model.setRelax4SysRule("addPartEquality_" + partCode + "_" + partQuantity)`
- `addParaEquality()` (line 999) -- calls `this.model.setRelax4SysRule("addParaEquality_" + paraCode + "_" + paraValue)`

### 3d. Attachment to CP-SAT constraints

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\AlgCPConstraint.java`

**Lines:** 79-88 (constructor)

```java
public AlgCPConstraint(Constraint cpConstraint, Literal relaxationVar, String relaxationVarName) {
    this.cpConstraint = cpConstraint;
    this.relaxationVar = relaxationVar;
    this.relaxationVarName = relaxationVarName;

    if (relaxationVar != null && cpConstraint != null) {
        cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not());
    }
}
```

Key semantics: the CP-SAT constraint `cpConstraint` gets an `onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not())` -- meaning the constraint is only enforced when `relaxVar == false`. When `relaxVar == true`, the constraint is "relaxed" (not enforced).

The `AlgCPModel.attachRelax()` method (lines 233-239) creates `AlgCPConstraint` objects, passing `this.currentRelaxVar` as the relaxation literal. Every `createAndTrackConstraint` and `createAndTrackBoolConstraint` method in `AlgCPModel` calls `attachRelax()`, meaning ALL constraints added through the model wrapper layer get relaxed.

---

## 4. ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.inferParasOld() -- INFEASIBLE + debugByRelaxVar

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java`

**Lines:** 280-348

The critical logic spans lines 304-337:

```
Step 1 (line 299): runInferParas(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>())  -- first solve without relax
Step 2 (line 304): if status == MODEL_INVALID -> validate and return failed
Step 3 (lines 313-315): if status not in {OPTIMAL, FEASIBLE, INFEASIBLE} -> return failed
Step 4 (lines 317-337): if INFEASIBLE && config.isDebugByRelaxVar():
    - First run:  runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs)  [isAttachRelax=true]
    - Second run: runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs)  [with first run's conflicts added to penalize re-relaxation]
    - Returns Result.noSolution(toConfictMessage(confictedRelaxs)) with the last run's solutions as data
Step 5 (lines 340-342): else (FEASIBLE/OPTIMAL, or INFEASIBLE without debug) -> execute post-processing and return success

IMPORTANT: When INFEASIBLE and debugByRelaxVar=false (the default), the code falls through to line 340-343, which returns `Result.success(solutions)` with an empty solutions list. This is noted as a potential issue in the RFC -- it should arguably return `Result.noSolution()` or `Result.failed()`.
```

---

## 5. runCalcConfictRules() and calcConfictRules()

### 5a. runCalcConfictRules()

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java`

**Lines:** 430-443

```java
private Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> runCalcConfictRules(Module module,
        InferParasReq req,
        boolean isAttachRelax,
        List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) throws AlgExecutorException {

    RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
    CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
    if (isFailed(status)) {
        throw new AlgExecutorException("Solver failed with status: " + status);
    }
    List<RelaxVar> newConfictedRelaxs = calcConfictRules(result);
    return new Pair<>(newConfictedRelaxs, result);

}
```

**What it does:** Calls `runInferParas` with relax mode enabled and any previously-identified conflicts. The previously-identified conflicts are passed so `setConfictedRelaxVars()` can increase their weight (via `WEIGHT_ADDER`), encouraging the solver to find *different* conflicts on the second pass. After solving, calls `calcConfictRules()` to extract the new set of conflict rules.

### 5b. calcConfictRules()

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java`

**Lines:** 402-414

```java
private List<RelaxVar> calcConfictRules(RunInferParasRsp result) {
    AlgCPModel relaxModel = result.getAlgCPModel();
    List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
    Map<String, RelaxVar> relaxVarMap = relaxModel.getRelaxVarMap();
    for (Map.Entry<String, RelaxVar> entry : relaxVarMap.entrySet()) {
        RelaxVar relaxVar = entry.getValue();
        if (result.getSolver().booleanValue(relaxVar.getValue())) {
            confictedRelaxs.add(relaxVar);
        }
    }
    return confictedRelaxs;
}
```

**What it does:** After the relaxed model has been solved, iterates through ALL registered relax variables and checks the boolean value of each in the solver's solution. If `relaxVar.value == true`, that constraint WAS relaxed (i.e., it is a conflicting constraint). These are collected and returned as the list of conflict rules.

### 5c. toConfictMessage()

**Lines:** 422-428

```java
private String toConfictMessage(List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) {
    StringBuilder conflictMessage = new StringBuilder("conflict rules: ");
    for (RelaxVar confictedRelax : confictedRelaxs) {
        conflictMessage.append(confictedRelax.getRuleCode()).append(",");
    }
    return conflictMessage.toString();
}
```

Simply builds a comma-separated string of conflict rule codes.

---

## 6. AlgCPConstraint class -- relaxationVar and onlyEnforceIf

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\AlgCPConstraint.java`

**Lines:** 1-186 (full class)

### Key fields (lines 22-77):

| Field | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `cpConstraint` | `Constraint` | The underlying CP-SAT constraint |
| `relaxationVar` | `Literal` | The relaxation variable; when false, constraint is enforced |
| `relaxationVarName` | `String` | Name for debugging |
| `name` | `String` | Constraint name (e.g. "addGreaterOrEqual") |
| `left`, `operator`, `right` | `String` | Constraint expression parts for toString() |
| `ifMemo` | `String` | Tracks `onlyEnforceIf()` conditions |
| `leftName`, `rightName` | `String` | Expression names for toString() |

### Relaxation mechanism in constructor (lines 79-88):

```java
public AlgCPConstraint(Constraint cpConstraint, Literal relaxationVar, String relaxationVarName) {
    this.cpConstraint = cpConstraint;
    this.relaxationVar = relaxationVar;
    this.relaxationVarName = relaxationVarName;

    if (relaxationVar != null && cpConstraint != null) {
        cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not());
    }
}
```

When `relaxationVar` is `false` -> `relaxationVar.not()` is `true` -> constraint is enforced.
When `relaxationVar` is `true` -> `relaxationVar.not()` is `false` -> constraint is NOT enforced (relaxed).

### onlyEnforceIf (lines 95-99):

```java
public void onlyEnforceIf(Literal condition) {
    cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(condition);
    ifMemo += " if " + toNameString(condition);
}
```

This is used for conditional constraints (if-then rules). Note: the `onlyEnforceIf` on line 86 (for relaxation) and the `onlyEnforceIf` on line 96 (for business condition) are BOTH applied to the same `cpConstraint` object. OR-Tools treats multiple `onlyEnforceIf` calls as AND conditions -- the constraint is enforced only when ALL conditions are true. So a conditional constraint like `if x > 10 then y > 7` becomes: enforce `y > 7` only when `x > 10` AND `not(relaxVar)`. Both the business condition AND the relax condition must hold for the constraint to be active.

### Unsupported operations (lines 106-117):

The `ConstraintProto.Builder` constructor and `onlyEnforceIf(Literal[])` method throw `UnsupportedOperationException` -- the class only supports single-literal enforcement.

---

## 7. AlgCPModel -- constraint creation with relaxation support

**File:** `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\AlgCPModel.java`

**Lines:** 1-1194

### Key relax-related fields (lines 56-76):

| Field | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `isAttachRelax` | `boolean` | Master switch -- when false, no relax vars are created |
| `relaxationVarMap` | `Map<String, RelaxVar>` | All relax vars registered so far (keyed by name like `"relax_rule3"`) |
| `confictedRelaxVarMap` | `Map<String, RelaxVar>` | Previously-identified conflict relax vars (for weight boosting on second pass) |
| `currentRelaxVar` | `BoolVar` | The currently active relax variable for new constraints |
| `currentRelaxVarName` | `String` | Name of the current relax var |

### Flow for creating a constraint with relaxation:

1. **Set current relax context:** Before any rule method executes, `setRelax4SysRule()` or `setRelax4CustomRule()` is called, which invokes `setCurrentRelaxVarName()` to create a `BoolVar` and store it in `currentRelaxVar`.

2. **Constraint creation:** Every constraint-adding method in `AlgCPModel` (e.g., `addEquality`, `addGreaterOrEqual`, `addBoolOr`, `addImplication`, etc.) calls either `createAndTrackConstraint()` or `createAndTrackBoolConstraint()`.

3. **Attaching relax:** These methods call `attachRelax()` (lines 233-239):
   ```java
   private AlgCPConstraint attachRelax(Constraint ct, String funName) {
       AlgCPConstraint constraint = new AlgCPConstraint(ct, this.currentRelaxVar, this.currentRelaxVarName);
       constraint.setName(funName);
       return constraint;
   }
   ```
   The `AlgCPConstraint` constructor then applies `cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not())`.

4. **IsAttachRelax guard:** If `isAttachRelax` is `false`, `setCurrentRelaxVarName()` returns immediately (line 149-151), so `currentRelaxVar` remains `null`, and the `AlgCPConstraint` constructor sees `relaxationVar == null` and skips the `onlyEnforceIf` call (line 82 checks `relaxationVar != null`).

5. **Constraint tracking:** All constraints are added to the `constraints` list for model summary printing and debugging.

6. **Conflict boost for second pass:** `setConfictedRelaxVars()` (lines 201-206) populates `confictedRelaxVarMap`. When the same ruleCode creates a relax var on a second diagnostic pass, `setCurrentRelaxVarName()` detects the pre-existence in `confictedRelaxVarMap` and boosts the weight by `WEIGHT_ADDER` (1000), encouraging the solver to relax *different* constraints instead.

---

## Summary of the overall architecture

```
User Request
    |
    v
inferParas() / inferParasOld()
    |
    +---> initConstraintModel()  -----> alg.init(model, module, moduleInput)
    |         |                              |
    |         +-- isAttachRelax              +-- setRelax4SysRule() / setRelax4CustomRule()
    |         +-- setConfictedRelaxVars()           calls setCurrentRelaxVarName()
    |                                              creates BoolVar + RelaxVar
    |                                        |
    |                                        +-- Every addConstraint() in AlgCPModel
    |                                              calls attachRelax()
    |                                              creates AlgCPConstraint
    |                                              applies onlyEnforceIf(relaxVar.not())
    |
    +---> alg.addRelaxObjectFunction()
    |         minimize(sum(relaxVar_i * weight_i))
    |
    +---> solver.solve(model, callback)
    |
    +---> if INFEASIBLE && debugByRelaxVar:
              +-- runCalcConfictRules()  (pass 1, no prior conflicts)
              +-- runCalcConfictRules()  (pass 2, with prior conflicts boosted)
              +-- return NO_SOLUTION with conflict message + relaxed solutions
```

Key files:
- `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\RelaxVar.java` -- data class for relax variables
- `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\AlgCPModel.java` -- model wrapper, creates/manages relax vars, attaches them to constraints
- `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\AlgCPConstraint.java` -- constraint wrapper, applies `onlyEnforceIf(relaxVar.not())`
- `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\ModuleBaseAlgImpl.java` -- algorithm base, triggers relax var creation before rules, builds objective function
- `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java` -- executor, orchestrates the 2-pass conflict detection on INFEASIBLE
- `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\model\ConstraintConfig.java` -- config with `debugByRelaxVar` flag (default `false`)
- `d:\03.code4codex\jmixconfigengine\rfc\找出冲突并求出一个可行解.md` -- RFC document describing the full design intent and test plan

143	    public static String toNameString(Literal lit) {
144	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar) {
145	            return ((com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar) lit).getName();
146	        }
147	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar) {
148	            return ((com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar) lit).getName();
149	        }
150	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.NotBoolVar) {
151	            String str = lit.toString();
152	            // str = not(sd1.S(0..1)) --> extract "sd1.S"
153	            // Parse the string: "not(varName(range))" -> "varName"
154	            if (str.startsWith("not(") && str.endsWith(")")) {
155	                String inner = str.substring(4, str.length() - 1); // Remove "not(" and ")"
156	                int parenIndex = inner.indexOf('(');
157	                if (parenIndex > 0) {
158	                    return "!" + inner.substring(0, parenIndex); // Extract variable name before "("
159	                }
160	            }
161	        }
162	        // Handle other unsupported Literal types
163	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException(
164	                "Unsupported Literal type: " + lit.getClass().getSimpleName()
165	                        + ". Only BoolVar, IntVar, and NotBoolVar are supported. Literal: " + lit);
166	    }

180	        }
181	        if (!rightName.isEmpty()) {

183	        }

185	    }
